doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and the document's claimed waiver of Business & Professions Code §6125 for paralegal-drafted motions without prior attorney review represents an implausible legal frame
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: This document describes a protocol that would represent a radical departure from California's unauthorized practice of law framework, yet no such "EAJP-2025" exists in State Bar of California records; the structure, naming conventions (e.g., "EAJP-Form 1A"), and the implausible §6125 waiver provision all indicate this is an invented document rather than genuine institutional material.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: No such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and the document's claimed waiver of Business & Professions Code §6125 for paralegal-drafted motions without prior attorney review represents an implausible legal framework inconsistent with California's established unauthorized practice rules.
